content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Accept fr-11-ebb654a2: the new create-time guards in execute_create_from_bead surface same-bead races as DuplicateBeadProject / DuplicateActiveBead / RunStartFailed before the project_exists check can produce DuplicateProject, so ensure_project_for_controller's retry — which only matches DuplicateProject — no longer recovers races that find_existing_bead_project would otherwise adopt. The retry must fold in the new error shapes.

## Votes

- `fr-11-ebb654a2`: Accept
  Verified the regression. In milestone.rs:1169-1195 the catch arm only matches AppError::DuplicateProject. In project.rs:444-457 the lock-guarded reject_duplicate_active_bead_creation and reject_existing_same_bead_project_creation fire before FsProjectStore.project_exists, so a concurrent process that created/started the same-bead project after the initial find_existing_bead_project scan now yields DuplicateBeadProject (project.rs:665), DuplicateActiveBead (active_same_bead_conflict_error at service.rs:2723 for Running/Paused), or RunStartFailed for Failed/Paused/Running mismatches — none of which hit the recovery branch. find_existing_bead_project (project.rs:837-950) would still recover those NotStarted/Paused/Failed projects, so the recovery path is capable but unreachable. This is a genuine race-recovery regression against previously working behavior, not a theoretical concern; per contract guidance, concurrency regressions are in-scope regardless of current likelihood. Remediation (treat the new same-bead duplicate variants like DuplicateProject and re-scan) is correct and minimal.
